---
title: "Civic Transparency Project"
subtitle: "Project Storyboard"
authors:
    - "Dan Swart"
    - "Holly Richard"
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
    slide-number: false
    controls: true
    progress: true
    transition: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---



```{r}
#| label: slide-1
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("marketing_storyboard_slides/Slide 1.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-2
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("marketing_storyboard_slides/Slide 2.png")

```

---


```{r}
#| label: slide-3
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("marketing_storyboard_slides/Slide 3.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-4
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("marketing_storyboard_slides/Slide 4.png")

```

---


```{r}
#| label: slide-5
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("marketing_storyboard_slides/Slide 5.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-6
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("marketing_storyboard_slides/Slide 6.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-7
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("marketing_storyboard_slides/Slide 7.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-8
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("marketing_storyboard_slides/Slide 8.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-9
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("marketing_storyboard_slides/Slide 9.png")

```

---

```{r}
#| label: slide-10
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: "center"

knitr::include_graphics("marketing_storyboard_slides/Slide 10.png")

```
